name: cortex-plugin-playwright
description: Give agents a real Chromium browser via Playwright — navigate, click, type, screenshot, and extract structured data from web pages
author: CortexPrism

tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Navigate the browser to a URL. Returns the page title and text content after load.

params.name: url
params.description: The URL to navigate to (must be HTTPS)

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Click on an element matching a CSS selector. Waits for the element to be visible first.

params.name: selector
params.description: CSS selector for the element to click

params.name: timeout
params.description: Max time to wait for the element in milliseconds (default: 5000)

tools.name: browser_type
tools.description: Type text into an input element matching a CSS selector. Clears existing content first.

params.name: selector
params.description: CSS selector for the input element

params.name: text
params.description: Text to type into the element

tools.name: browser_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current page or a specific element.

params.name: selector
params.description: Optional CSS selector to screenshot a specific element (default: full page)

params.name: fullPage
params.description: Whether to capture the full scrollable page (default: true)

tools.name: browser_extract
tools.description: Extract structured data from the current page using a CSS selector. Returns text, attributes, or HTML.

params.name: selector
params.description: CSS selector for the element(s) to extract

params.name: attribute
params.description: HTML attribute to extract (e.g., 'href', 'src'). Omit to extract text content.

params.name: multiple
params.description: Whether to extract from all matching elements (default: false, returns first match)

tools.name: browser_evaluate
tools.description: Execute JavaScript in the browser context and return the result. Use for DOM queries, data extraction, or interaction.

params.name: script
params.description: JavaScript code to execute in the browser page context

tools.name: browser_close
tools.description: Close the browser instance and release resources.

fields.label: Headless Mode
fields.description: Run browser without a visible window

fields.label: Viewport Width
fields.description: Default browser viewport width in pixels

fields.label: Viewport Height
fields.description: Default browser viewport height in pixels

fields.label: Default Timeout (ms)
fields.description: Default timeout for operations in milliseconds

tools: Claude Code (Anthropic) — initial scaffold and implementation
